sections.title: Starting the miniquest
Talking to Khazard again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, what was I supposed to do again?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You goldfish! Go find the Sin Seer - she will determine if you are trustworthy. She lives in Seers' Village to the south of here.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Wooooo whooo wooo. Whoot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You tell 'em.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You can see into the Shadow Realm and yet you are not of it. Oh well, you will be of no use.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh? What do you mean I am not of it?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Your form is still solid. To be of the Shadow Realm you must be less opaque.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello, General.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: What? You are not dead and yet you walk and talk in the Shadow Realm. Explain yourself.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a being of great power and experience. I can see and speak to ghosts. For my assistance they clothed me in their garb. Can I offer you assistance, General?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: This intrigues me. How do you know me? You look familiar but I can't place it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, well, you don't really have eyes, so how can you tell?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: There are ways to see that you humans cannot grasp.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: It doesn't matter anyway. You are not of the blood and I cannot trust you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm a very trustworthy person.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: That is not something I can take your word on.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So who's word would you take?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Hmm... There is one person's word I would believe. If you visited the Sin Seer, and she judged you trustworthy, then I would have use for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where would I find her?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Well, considering I told you she was a seer, of sorts, I would imagine you would find her in Seers' Village. It is to the south of here, not far.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Go and see her, return with her report and I will see if I have use for you. You will be well rewarded.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay! That sounds reasonable. Sin Seer, huh? How do you know someone like her?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: It's a long story, and I do not have the time to tell it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just have one of those faces.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: True, I never can tell you humans apart. You're all ugly creatures, anyway.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: It doesn't matter anyway. You are not of the blood and I cannot trust you.

sections.title: Talking to Sin Seer
Talking to the Sin Seer after getting the note

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Whatcha lookin' at chicken legs? Don't you have a General you should speak to?

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: You already have one. Get on with you!

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Here ya go. Take more care of it this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm looking for the Sin Seer.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Are you another one of those 'holier than thou' fools wanting to redeem themselves?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, no actually, I'm trying to join a really evil guy's team.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Really? Finally, something worthwhile.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: It was fun messing with those devotees the first few times but, after a while, condemning people to an eternity of damnation gets a bit dull.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: So, whom are you trying to hook up with? Dark priest? Warlord? Penguin?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, I want to prove to General Khazard I'm trustworthy.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Oh, that old fart? Is he still around? Humph. I dunno if I can be bothered.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What if I pay you for the trouble - would you then? I can't imagine you make much money, seeing people's sins and all.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Oh, there's money in it. I just don't get invited to many parties.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: You got me all excited about evil plots, and now it's just a matter of trust. I really can't be bothered to strain myself on that account.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine, you don't actually have to see my sins, just pronounce me to be trustworthy. I'll pay you and be on my way.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: He'll know it's a lie. But I do need the cash, so I'll do it. Gimme 40 gold coins and you'll be as trustworthy as a newborn.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's the money.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Sorry, you don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Fine. I declare you trustworthy, if you consider bribing a seer a trustworthy transaction.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Give this note to Khazard, it will prove you have been to see me.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: PLEASE! I want to know what he's up to.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Ooooh, you're going to learn of his plans and stab him in the back?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Absolutely.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Fine, give me 40 gold coins and I'll take a look at your sins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Here's the money.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Sorry, you don't have enough money.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: You have done many great deeds...but many terrible deeds. Sometimes you do them by accident, but are still sins. No, I would not trust you to walk my dog.

lines.speaker: Sin Seer
lines.text: Give this note to Khazard, it will prove you have been to see me.

sections.title: Returning to Khazard
Speaking to Khazard again

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Do you make progress in finding my scouts?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't found any. Where were they headed?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've found [one/two/three], but they're kind of hard to find. Where were they headed again?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: One was to go to a jungle to the south.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: One was to go to the land of the gnomes and explore their holdings.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: One was to explore where the White Knights rule.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: One was to go to a place of great heat.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: If I knew more of their locations I would go myself. Now go and finish the job.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I have been to the Sin Seer. She has made her verdict.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: And?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, and I seem to have misplaced the note she gave me.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Well, you'd best go get another one! Be off with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: She said to give you this note to prove I went to see her.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: The note says you have committed many sins and atrocities in your life. I'm impressed; I will use you.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: It has been a long time since I have left my home in the south. I have lost track of what is going on in the world, but now it is imperative that I know.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: So, I sent out four scouts to gather information for me. I brought them to walk like me in the Shadow Realm, so they would be safe from my enemies.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: I sent them on four missions. One was to go to the land of the gnomes and explore their holdings. One was to go to a jungle to the south. One was to explore where the White Knights rule. And one to the place that

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: I once called home - a place of great heat.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: I am going to entrust you with a very important message, which you must deliver to each one of them.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Tell them: The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You can trust me to do it, sir!

sections.title: The four scouts
Talking to a scout without ghostly robes

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I am on a mission. I cannot spare time to speak to you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Spy! I shall kill you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Eek!

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: You can see into the Shadow Realm, but you are not of it. I cannot trust you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am not of it? What Shadow Realm? Hello? He's not listening.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Begone, you filthy human. I spare no words for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All you had to say was: 'Please, come back some other time.'

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: A mere mortal can see into the Shadow Realm? The General will want to know of this.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: General who? Hello? How rude, he's not listening.

sections.title: Scout east of Tai Bwo Wannai

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! General Khazard sent me.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: You must be a great mage to be able to see me, human.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, are you a ghost?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Nothing so morbid. I am a scout for Khazard, and I move more easily through the land unseen. There are enemies everywhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you're not a ghost, why do I need an Amulet of Ghostspeak to talk to you?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Those who walk fully in the Shadow Realm become warped by it and speak as ghosts do. That is why I cannot speak to you unless you wear the amulet.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Well, here's your message.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khazard says: 'The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.'

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Thank you, messenger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, how's your mission going?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: There is nothing pleasant about this land. The animals are vile, the temperature is unbearable and the plant life is often more dangerous than the animals.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: There were some strange occurrences in Tai Bwo Wannai. The people fled their village because their gods were angry with them, or the like, but now they have returned. I must investigate why.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Shilo Village was overrun with the undead, but someone of great ability has brought the situation under control.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, there's always something interesting going on here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any idea where the other scouts are?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I am a scout, not a spy. I do not keep track of them.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I was told to go south, so here I am. I know one was to investigate the gnomes. I believe one headed towards Asgarnia. Another was told to go to a place of great heat, but that they would have to sneak through a pass.

sections.title: Scout south of the Tree Gnome Stronghold

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! General Khazard sent me.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: What news, skinbag?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, no need to be rude.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Your smell disgusts me, so make it quick.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khazard says: 'The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.'

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I'll be glad when all this is over. The General will be strong again and we will push back this tide of filth that is humanity.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oi! I am one of the filth, I mean, humans! Besides, we were here first.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Haa, haa, haa. Oh, you naive mortals. There were many here before you. The last time the General went north, all this land belonged to the elves. Do not think so highly of your race.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Discovered anything interesting on your travels?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: As I passed through Ardougne, I overheard some news. The plague in the west grows worse. King Lathas's popularity continues to increase as he tries to combat it. I suspect there is more to be learned, but my

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: mission is to observe gnomes, not humans.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: As I passed through Ardougne, I overheard some news. The plague in the west was revealed to be a hoax. King Lathas was executed and a new king now rules in his place. I suspect there is more to be learned, but my

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: mission is to observe gnomes, not humans.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I have heard that the cultists, who think they are so well hidden in the sewers, have succeeded in their ritual.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I have heard that the cultists, who think they are so well hidden in the sewers, have failed in their ritual.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I head to the land of the gnomes; rumours say it is peaceful right now.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: But I hear Glough has lost his position as advisor.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: That is all I have heard.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm still looking for some of the other scouts. Any suggestions?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I was ordered west. One was told to seek out the warmth of the jungles. The other two headed east: one in search of deserts, the other in search of knights.

sections.title: Scout near Falador

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! General Khazard sent me.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Finally, news! What message does he send?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Err, it was something about planets.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Well, spit it out! I can't wait here all day.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khazard says: 'The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.'

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Good. I long for the slaughter. These local squabbles and politics bore me. I wonder if the others have begun to move as well?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The other what? Who are you slaughtering?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Ah, not for your ears, messenger!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So how's your mission going. Enjoying the Draynor woods?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: The villagers still live in fear of the Count of Draynor Manor, so all is as it should be.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: There is talk in the village that the Count of Draynor Manor has been slain by some meddling adventurer. I will need to enter the manor to verify this.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Other than that, nothing of interest.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you been in touch with any of the other scouts?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I'm too busy scouting to be in touch. One headed this direction with me seeking the place of heat and sand, another sought a place of moisture and growth and the last sought gnomes.

sections.title: Scout at the Shantay Pass

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! General Khazard sent me.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Gah! Don't sneak up on me!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh, sorry.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I think I can see my heart pounding!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You're pretty jumpy for a scout. I thought you'd be made of sterner stuff.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: What is it you want exactly?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I bring a message from the General!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khazard says: 'The planets are nearing alignment; we will meet in the place of half light and ice soon. Beware of the others, for though they are weak and few, they are cunning.'

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Oh good, I long for the cold. This place is so hot! The General has told me much of his time spent here and I can see why he left.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, did the General live here?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Long ago, yes. But not by choice. His evil lord and master forced him and his kind to reside here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khazard with a master? Hard to believe. Who was it?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I think I have said too much already.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what have you discovered on your travels through the desert?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: The fighting in the desert has come to a stop. However, there is still much distrust between Menaphos and Al Kharid. It seems like it would be possible to reignite the war if needed.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I have heard whisperings in the bandit camp that the prisoner of Jaldraocht is now free.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I followed one called Lazim. He let slip that he had discovered the buried temple. Now the two others who were there are on the move. The General may find there are new players at the ritual this time.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The desert seems to be a hotbed of information. Do you want me to relay any of this to the General?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Not at this time. I must investigate further.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Any idea where I can find the other scouts?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Hmm, I left one of them near a haunted wood - the trees kept trying to hit us. One scout headed for the jungle and the other for the gnomes.

sections.title: When the last scout is found

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I've found all of you now.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: How do you mean?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The General sent me to find his four scouts, and now I've found all of you and delivered his message.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: You have served the General well. I hope he rewards you. How did you come to his service?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He was surprised to see someone like me in the Shadow Realm and I offered to give him assistance if he needed it.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: You did not know of him before that? I am surprised he would speak to someone who did not know of his greatness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Greatness? He's crazy. He kidnapped innocent people and butchered them in his arena. Not to mention sicking that dog on people. Killing it was the best thing I ever...heard about.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: Indeed? Strange you would serve a man you feel that way about, but I will not doubt the General's judgement. You'd best go back to the General and report. I have a message you could take him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, let 'er rip.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I have nothing to rip, but the message is 'We of the blood are still loyal. Pavlov is the messenger.'

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right, I'll remember that. Anything else?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: No, you may go.

sections.title: Talking to a scout again

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So, what was I supposed to do now?

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: You must speak to General Khazard to obtain your 'well-earned' reward.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard after finding all of the scouts

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I did it, sir! I found all of the scouts and delivered your message. The last one said I should report back to you.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Oh, and what did he say that for?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He said to tell you, 'We of the blood are still loyal. Pavlov is the messenger.'

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Ah. Interesting. Well, you have served your purpose. Now to award you with something appropriate.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: There is a cave near where the fish-men gather. Go to the east branch of this cave and seek out one who lives in the Shadow Realm. He will reward you well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Right! Fish-men. Cave. Ghost. Thanks, General!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Wait! Take this, it is the key to your reward.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You do not have enough space for it. Speak to me again when you do.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ugh, well, at least it's not another hand.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Ah, you have dealt with severed limbs before?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's a long story.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ugh! A leg? That's revolting!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Don't worry if you lose it, I can always get more to replace it.

sections.title: Talking to Khazard again
Talking to a scout after receiving the severed leg

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The General said I would find my reward near where the fish-men gather. I don't know what he means!

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: The General is a bit...cliché. Fish-men are fishermen. Now, away with you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, sir. Where was my reward again?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: There is a cave near where the fish-men gather. Go there and seek out one who lives in the Shadow Realm. He will reward you well.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I lost the key to my reward.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Incompetent fool!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: You already have one. What use could you have for two?

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Here, take another. They are easy to come by.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Never mind.

sections.title: Entering the crevice in the Goblin Caves
Trying to enter the crevice without the severed leg

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hmm, I'd better not go in without the leg, I mean key. Khazard said I wouldn't get my reward without it.

sections.title: Defeating Bouncer

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Away, darn spot!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What the...! It's Bouncer, Khazard's hell hound.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Khazard tricked me! This is no reward, he's trying to get me killed...AGAIN!

sections.title: Talking to Khazard after killing Bouncer's ghost
Talking to a scout after killing Bouncer's ghost

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Scout
lines.text: I can't speak to you; I must continue on my mission.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your dog attacked me. AGAIN!

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: He was angry that you killed him. Quite natural, really.

lines.speaker: General Khazard
lines.text: Now get out of here, you filthy skinbag. I will not waste my time on you.
